reference: Okay, I am a male, fourteen years old. I have a yellow spot above my right nipple. Do you know the cause? I have not fought, and I have not been poked. I noticed it today. It does not hurt at all; I am just worried because it popped up out of nowhere. I have a small white lump above it. Please help; I am scared.
text: And my foot, as I watch it, it is quiet.
